fastPatchCore.goal: make post patch/comment counter update use a direct fast path: no default live getMessage, async DB sync after editMessage, skip poll query when no poll marker

persistentStore.goal: client-bot-channel binding and patched posts survive redeploys and code updates

postArchive.currentStoragePolicy: store all posts/snapshots physically; tariff limits 5/15/30 are marketing limits to apply later without deleting stored data

polls.mode: callback buttons under patched MAX post

policy: No video/files in comments. Photos only inside comments. Native inline hints only; no overlay/float hints.
debugPolicy: Clean V3 menu audit routes plus Postgres store/archive/polls/patch timing status. No stress in normal checks.
manualCheck: After redeploy open /version?t=7616 and verify runtimeVersion CC8.1.16-FAST-PATCH-CORE-PR76
Create a new direct channel post and check patch.done is below 900 ms when MAX editMessage is healthy
Add a text comment and check the post comment counter updates without enrich_live/db_sync blocking
Forward a post from another channel and verify the forwarded card is selected/saved; if MAX does not allow editing the forwarded original, the admin menu must still keep the selected post context
